title: Relentless (disambiguation)
content:
'''Relentless''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Relentless]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Admiral]] [[Kassius Konstantine]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''''[[Relentless (cruiser)|Relentless]]''''', a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Meeba (Republic Navy)|Meeba]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*'''''[[Relentless (Star Destroyer)|Relentless]]''''', a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vanko]].
*'''''[[Relentless (Dorja)|Relentless]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dorja]] and used by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]] as a [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] during the latest point of its history.
*'''''[[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|Relentless]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that attempted to destroy the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] project.
*'''''[[Relentless (Pellaeon-class)|Relentless]]''''', a [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Dru Valan]].
*'''''[[Relentless (Sith Imperial ship)|Relentless]]''''', a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial]] ship used by [[Darth Krayt]] as his royal transport.

{{Disambig}}
